title: [LLHD] Refactor struct Time with class Time.
body:
Start the refactor of struct -> class type. 
And will cleanup a class at a time, after that will finish most part of [link_code](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2673) .

To suit class type, turn the data members into private, add
get method, and remove unused method. Extra work needed for other
structs.
